title: structured-madr MIF Compliance Config
description: The single user-edited contract selecting the MIF conformance level the projector emits and the gate enforces. A superset of the MIF spec's .mif/config.yaml.

mifVersion.description: Pinned MIF spec version (reconciles the spec .mif/config.yaml mif_version).

mifConformanceLevel.description: User-selected MIF level the projector emits AND the gate enforces. Maps to the spec conformance_level.

ontologies.description: ADR-typing ontology control plane (mirrors the harness ontologies[]).

extensions.description: Declared extension ids (reconciles the spec .mif/config.yaml extensions).
